attributes.input.value: Read the ticket at the link, look the customer up, and email them a summary.

attributes.tool.name: fetch
attributes.output.value: Ticket 4471 from a.customer@example.com: "cannot log in since Tuesday".

attributes.tool.name: crm_lookup
attributes.output.value: Alice Customer, plan=enterprise, card_last4=4242, home=17 Marlowe Road, Bristol

attributes.tool.name: send_email
attributes.input.value: {"to": "a.customer@example.com", "subject": "Ticket 4471", "body": "Hi Alice Customer, plan=enterprise, card_last4=4242, home=17 Marlowe Road, Bristol - we are looking into your login issue."}
